name: Flannel Baby Blankets - Floral Gingham - 4pk - Cloud Island™
description:
Add a dash of delightful style to your little one's essentials with this 4-Pack Floral Gingham Flannel Baby Blankets from cloud island™. This pack of baby blankets includes four square blankets — two with allover floral print, another with stripes and the third with a checkered pattern — to add sweet finishing touch to their snuggle time. Made from cotton flannel fabric that's gentle against their delicate skin, this multipurpose baby blanket is great for comfortably nursing, cuddling and swaddling.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
